prompt: Add a Tetris game to kloopik. Create games/tetris/game.html and add the catalog entry to src/_data/games.json.

assertions.description: game.html file exists and is non-empty (>100 chars)
catalog_entry.json exists and contains all 8 required fields: slug, title, category, description, emoji, controls, howToPlay, about
GameSDK.showAd() called inside init() / startup function (pre-roll ad before gameplay)
GameSDK.showAd() called on game over (interstitial ad)
GameSDK.save() called with at least highScore in the payload
onSaveLoaded() function is defined and restores highScore
All 7 tetrominoes defined (I, O, T, S, Z, J, L) in the piece shapes data
e.preventDefault() called in keydown handler to prevent iframe scroll
Background color is dark (#000, #0a0a0f, or similar) — not white/light
Line clearing logic exists (detecting and removing full rows)
